mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.avatar, u.password, u.status, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark, u.is_deleted, d.dept_id AS d_dept_id, d.dept_name AS d_dept_name, d.leader AS d_leader FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id AND d.del_flag = '0'
u.is_deleted = 0
AND ${ew.sqlSegment}
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.avatar, u.password, u.status, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark, u.is_deleted, d.dept_id AS d_dept_id, d.dept_name AS d_dept_name, d.leader AS d_leader, r.role_id AS r_role_id, r.role_name AS r_role_name, r.role_key AS r_role_key FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id AND d.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id AND r.del_flag = '0' WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0

SELECT u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.avatar, u.password, u.status, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.update_by, u.update_time, u.remark, u.is_deleted, d.dept_id AS d_dept_id, d.dept_name AS d_dept_name, d.leader AS d_leader, r.role_id AS r_role_id, r.role_name AS r_role_name, r.role_key AS r_role_key FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id AND d.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id AND r.del_flag = '0' WHERE u.user_name = #{userName} AND u.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET login_ip = #{ip}, login_date = #{loginDate} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
